priorDetermination.denialRationale: Coverage for the requested whole exome sequencing (CPT 0214U, 0215U) is denied. Based on the information submitted, the request does not meet the plan's medical necessity criteria under Policy 2026T0589AA. Specifically: (1) the documentation does not establish that a single-gene or targeted panel test was performed prior to exome sequencing; and (2) the documentation does not sufficiently establish that the member's clinical presentation meets the required phenotypic criteria. If you believe this determination is incorrect, you may submit an appeal with additional supporting clinical documentation.
